summary: Promote `clients` and `jobs` parents to top level; rename Cobra Use `jobber-jobs` to `jobs`; remove dropped-novel sections from README.
reason: Transport rewrite is done; the generated parents were Hidden:true (press v4.9.0 default for multi-endpoint parents) and `jobber-jobs` carried a press-collision-era prefix that no longer applies. README also still referenced novels (jobs pnl / payouts reconcile / jobs stale / funnel / clients 360) that were dropped from locked scope.
validated_outcome: Top-level --help now lists `clients` and `jobs` alongside other resources; `go build ./...` and `go vet ./...` pass.
